name: Inductive charger
summary: Charge your device easily without the need of cables, by simply placing your smartphone over the induction charger. This item is particularly suitable for the current Samsung and Apple smartphones starting from iPhone 8.
descriptionLong: Charge your device easily without the need of cables, by simply placing your smartphone over the induction charger. This item is particularly suitable for the current Samsung and Apple smartphones starting from iPhone 8.

name: Bamboo wireless charger with pen holder
summary: Bamboo wireless charger with pen holder. When the charger is fully loaded, the green light will shine. Cable included.
descriptionLong: Bamboo wireless charger with pen holder. When the charger is fully loaded, the green light will shine. Cable included.

name: Limestone cement wireless charger
summary: Wireless Charger made from limestone cement and cork for perfect Hold. Suitable with for al QI-compatible Mobile Phones.
descriptionLong: Wireless Charger made from limestone cement and cork for perfect Hold. Suitable with for al QI-compatible Mobile Phones.

name: Bamboo wireless charger
summary: 10 Watt bamboo wireless charger with reading lamp for smartphones, including a charging cable. Charges all QI-enabled smartphones. Your logo will be engraved on the charger.
descriptionLong: 10 Watt bamboo wireless charger with reading lamp for smartphones, including a charging cable. Charges all QI-enabled smartphones. Your logo will be engraved on the charger.

name: Bamboo wireless charger with 2 USB ports
summary: Wireless charger with bamboo coating and 2 USB outputs.
descriptionLong: Wireless charger with bamboo coating and 2 USB outputs.

name: Wireless charging desk pad
summary: Eco bamboo desk organizer with smartphone holder, wireless charger, USB charging cable, and a storage compartment for office supplies. The wireless charging function works only when connected to a power source, so the...
descriptionLong: Eco bamboo desk organizer with smartphone holder, wireless charger, USB charging cable, and a storage compartment for office supplies. The wireless charging function works only when connected to a power source, so the USB cable must be plugged into a laptop or a wall adapter. Input:DC5V/1.5A Output:DC5V 1A. Due to the natural material, variations in color and grain may occur between products, which may affect the final appearance of branding.

name: Desk clock with wireless charger
summary: Bamboo desk clock with smartphone holder, wireless charger, and storage compartment. USB charging cable included.
descriptionLong: Bamboo desk clock with smartphone holder, wireless charger, and storage compartment. USB charging cable included.

name: Bamboo weather station
summary: Bamboo weather station / wireless charger with digital display showing temperature, humidity and time. Provides a stable stand.
descriptionLong: Bamboo weather station / wireless charger with digital display showing temperature, humidity and time. Provides a stable stand.

name: Charging station for 4 devices
summary: Bamboo charging station for four smartphones or tablets with one wireless charging slot, two USB ports and one USB-C port. Charging cable included.
descriptionLong: Bamboo charging station for four smartphones or tablets with one wireless charging slot, two USB ports and one USB-C port. Charging cable included.

name: Wireless charger with 2 USB ports
summary: Plastic wireless charger with 2 USB ports, charging cable included. Charges all QI enabled smartphones.
descriptionLong: Plastic wireless charger with 2 USB ports, charging cable included. Charges all QI enabled smartphones.

name: Recycled aluminium pen holder
summary: Recycled aluminium pen holder with wireless charging function and USB hub (5 watt output). Includes C-Type charging cable.
descriptionLong: Recycled aluminium pen holder with wireless charging function and USB hub (5 watt output). Includes C-Type charging cable.

name: Wireless charger with LED display
summary: Wireless charger with fast charging function (power up to 10 watts) and LED display. When the device is ready for charging, a green LED ring lights up; during the charging process, a blue LED ring lights up. Including...
descriptionLong: Wireless charger with fast charging function (power up to 10 watts) and LED display. When the device is ready for charging, a green LED ring lights up; during the charging process, a blue LED ring lights up. Including the charging cable.

name: Elegant phone stand
summary: Elegant Pierre Cardin phone stand with 15W wireless charging function. It is suitable for all types of smartphones and iPhones. The phone can be inserted into the stand in either a vertical or horizontal position. The...
descriptionLong: Elegant Pierre Cardin phone stand with 15W wireless charging function. It is suitable for all types of smartphones and iPhones. The phone can be inserted into the stand in either a vertical or horizontal position. The stand is made of aircraft-grade aluminum and is covered with an elegant gray fabric. Input 9V/2A, 12V/1.5A (USB-C PD). It has protection against overheating and overvoltage. The package includes a charging cable with a Type-C connector. Packed in a gift box, comes with a certificate of authenticity.

name: Phone stand
summary: An elegant Pierre Cardin phone stand with 15W wireless charging function. The stand is made of wood imitation, which gives it a luxurious look. It includes a plastic frame with 3 shades of light. Input with USB Type-C...
descriptionLong: An elegant Pierre Cardin phone stand with 15W wireless charging function. The stand is made of wood imitation, which gives it a luxurious look. It includes a plastic frame with 3 shades of light. Input with USB Type-C 9V2A. Packed in a gift box with a certificate of authenticity.
